summary.what: Harden beads/dolt setup: unique port 3308, dolt remote configured with initial push, CLAUDE.md steering for sync workarounds and recovery
summary.why: Cross-repo port collision on default 3307 caused misleading errors; sandbox blocking localhost TCP was misdiagnosed as stale PIDs — unique ports and documented workarounds prevent both
summary.how: bd dolt set port 3308, bd dolt remote add + raw dolt push --force, added Beads/Dolt Sync section to CLAUDE.md, gitignored dolt-config.log
